frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields valid; description 412 chars; composes_with maintain-context exists; BUT disable-model-invocation: true is the same out-of-spec field as in setup-project-skills.

description_quality.notes: 412 chars; starts with 'Step back'; three trigger contexts; states exclusion ('Explicit invocation only').

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 24 lines — minimal by design for a single-prompt orientation skill.

instruction_clarity.notes: Three short imperative lines; clear output format; explicit non-goal. No worked example.

coordination.notes: composes_with maintain-context accurate; shared_read: ['*'] reasonable for read-only tool.

completeness.notes: No worked example of output format; assumes CONTEXT.md convention without anchoring to setup-project-skills.

anti_patterns.notes: No MUST/NEVER abuse; no hardcoded paths; non-goal correctly framed.
